title: Mario Paint Composer - Freezeezy Peak (Banjo-Kazooie)
description:
I still like Levus' old version but I figured I'd have a crack at this.

This one was actually really easy thanks to a superbly transcribed midi someone made ages ago. Hats off to them. I mostly had difficulty settling on what instruments to use where, as may be evident by all the "alt" files in play.
